scripts.prebuild: npm run copy:assets && npm run build:papers
scripts.copy:assets: for slug in fibonacci primes fractal; do [ -f "../renders/output/${slug}.mp4" ] && cp -f "../renders/output/${slug}.mp4" "public/videos/${slug}.mp4"; done; for slug in fibonacci primes fractal; do [ -f "../renders/output/${slug}-poster.png" ] && cp -f "../renders/output/${slug}-poster.png" "public/posters/${slug}.png"; done; true
scripts.build:papers: mkdir -p public/papers && for f in ../papers/*.tex; do [ -f "$f" ] && pandoc --from latex --to html5 --mathjax "$f" -o "public/papers/$(basename $f .tex).html"; done
